toolSpec.name: ExecuteQuery
toolSpec.description: Execute a PromQL query against Amazon Managed Prometheus.

workspace_id.description: The Prometheus workspace ID to use (e.g., ws-12345678-abcd-1234-efgh-123456789012). Optional if a URL is configured via command line arguments.

time.description: Optional timestamp for query evaluation (RFC3339 or Unix timestamp)

profile.description: AWS profile to use (defaults to None)

toolSpec.name: ExecuteRangeQuery
toolSpec.description: Execute a range query and return the result.

workspace_id.description: The Prometheus workspace ID to use (e.g., ws-12345678-abcd-1234-efgh-123456789012). Optional if a URL is configured via command line arguments.

step.description: Query resolution step width (duration format, e.g. '15s', '1m', '1h')

profile.description: AWS profile to use (defaults to None)

toolSpec.name: ListMetrics
toolSpec.description: Get a list of all metric names.

workspace_id.description: The Prometheus workspace ID to use (e.g., ws-12345678-abcd-1234-efgh-123456789012). Optional if a URL is configured via command line arguments.

profile.description: AWS profile to use (defaults to None)

toolSpec.name: GetServerInfo
toolSpec.description: Get information about the Prometheus server configuration.

workspace_id.description: The Prometheus workspace ID to use (e.g., ws-12345678-abcd-1234-efgh-123456789012). Optional if a URL is configured via command line arguments.

profile.description: AWS profile to use (defaults to None)

toolSpec.name: GetAvailableWorkspaces
toolSpec.description: List all available Prometheus workspaces in the specified region.

profile.description: AWS profile to use (defaults to None)
